name: Jack B. Yeats: The Man who Painted Ireland
original_name: Jack B. Yeats: The Man who Painted Ireland
overview: Author Colm Tóibín explores the legacy of the artist to mark the 150th anniversary of his birth, chronicling his evolution as a painter. Narrated by Pierce Brosnan.
